findings.description: 4,027 tests across 621 test files covering 542 source files. 15 test projects with coverlet.collector configured. 3-tier test architecture: Tier 1 (unit, no deps), Tier 2 (integration, DAPR slim), Tier 3 (E2E, full DAPR + Docker). 19 Fake implementations in Testing project for isolation.
evidence: coverlet.collector referenced in all 15 test .csproj files
recommendations: MINOR: Add coverlet coverage gate to CI pipeline (e.g., 70% line coverage minimum)
OPTIONAL: Generate and publish coverage reports to PR comments

findings.description: TreatWarningsAsErrors=true globally via Directory.Build.props. Nullable=enable globally. 63-line .editorconfig enforcing file-scoped namespaces, Allman braces, 4-space indentation, naming conventions. No AnalysisLevel or EnforceCodeStyleInBuild explicitly set (using SDK defaults).
evidence: No suppressed warnings in Directory.Build.props (clean baseline)
recommendations: OPTIONAL: Add EnforceCodeStyleInBuild=true for CI style enforcement
OPTIONAL: Set AnalysisLevel=latest-all for maximum analyzer coverage

findings.description: Centralized package management via Directory.Packages.props prevents version drift. Semantic-release with Conventional Commits ensures consistent versioning. DAPR abstraction layer isolates backend changes (NFR29: zero code changes for backend swap). Immutable event envelope design (14 fields) prevents schema drift.

195 markdown documentation files in docs/. CLAUDE.md project guide, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md (auto-generated by semantic-release), PR template, API reference generation support (GenerateDocumentationFile conditional). 511 of 542 source files have XML doc comments.
evidence: 511/542 source files with /// <summary> XML doc comments (94%)
recommendations: OPTIONAL: Add docs validation to CI (link checking, markdown linting)

priority_actions: MINOR: Add coverlet coverage gate to CI pipeline
OPTIONAL: Generate coverage reports in PR comments
summary: Maintainability posture is LOW risk. Strong structural controls: TreatWarningsAsErrors globally, Nullable=enable, .editorconfig enforcement, centralized package management, semantic-release, 4,027 tests with coverlet on all 15 test projects, 195 documentation pages, 94% XML doc comment coverage. No coverage percentage gate in CI — risk accepted given test volume and warnings-as-errors policy.
